query: Move the report document from the drafts folder to the final submissions directory.
Rename the image file photo_2023.jpg to summer_vacation.jpg in the current directory.
Shift the configuration file config.yaml from /tmp to /etc/myapp/
Transfer the spreadsheet budget.xlsx to the shared drive under finance.

Relocate the video file meeting_recording.mp4 to the presentations folder.

Rename the text file notes.txt to project_notes.txt.

Shift the document contract.pdf from the pending folder to the signed folder.
